title: Seedplex
summary: Seedplex is building venture-token infrastructure that blends startup fundraising with token liquidity. Arcium lists it as a verified project coming to mainnet, but the public Seedplex materials I reviewed do not yet document the exact Arcium module.
description:
Seedplex markets venture tokens as a new model for startup fundraising, combining equity-like exposure with earlier token liquidity. The project frames itself around letting growth companies raise without forcing investors to wait years for liquidity.

Arcium's mainnet page lists Seedplex among verified projects coming to the network. That is stronger than a generic ecosystem mention, but I did not find a current Seedplex page that explains the exact Arcium-powered component, so Atlas should still keep the relationship at ecosystem-project level.

bodySections.title: What_Atlas_Reviewed
bodySections.body: The official Seedplex site is positioned around venture tokens and a hybrid fundraising model. That makes it relevant to Atlas because private capital formation and controlled investor visibility are natural places for encrypted computation to matter.

bodySections.title: Mainnet_Status
bodySections.body: Arcium's mainnet page lists Seedplex among verified projects coming to the network. That raises confidence above a generic partner mention, but without a project-side implementation page Atlas should still avoid labeling it a confirmed integration.

statusNote: Arcium lists Seedplex as a verified mainnet project, but I did not find a current Seedplex page documenting the exact Arcium-powered product component.
